home.title: Genetikon Genetics Center — Medical Genetics, Stem Cell Therapy & IVF
home.description: Genetikon Genetics Center in Batumi, Georgia: medical genetics laboratory, stem cell therapy laboratory and IVF center. Informational and international-patient friendly.

home.heroKicker: Genetics Center — Stem Cell Therapy Laboratory
home.heroTitle: Medical genetics, stem cell therapy and fertility care
home.heroSubtitle: Three specialized laboratories under one center in Batumi, Georgia — for patients seeking clarity, evidence and careful guidance.
home.trustLine: Informational content · Patient confidentiality · International coordination
home.departmentsLede: One center, three specialized laboratories — genetics, regenerative medicine and reproductive care under a single clinical standard.
home.internationalBody: Batumi is easy to reach. We help you plan your visit with multilingual coordination, travel and accommodation guidance.
home.contactBody: Tell us what you need and we will respond with the right information.

medicalGenetics.name: Medical Genetics Laboratory
medicalGenetics.summary: Genetic counseling, screening and diagnostic testing, prenatal diagnosis, NIPT and PGT.

stemCell.name: Stem Cell Therapy Laboratory
stemCell.summary: Regenerative medicine — protocol-based, autologous cultured stem cell processes and honest, hedged information.

ivf.name: IVF Center
ivf.summary: IVF/ICSI, donation, surrogacy and PGD — with realistic, informational guidance for international patients.

disclaimer.medical: This content is for information only and does not replace medical advice. Outcomes vary from patient to patient. Please consult your physician before any procedure.
disclaimer.stemCell: Regulatory and evidence status varies by indication. Some applications are investigational; results are not guaranteed and vary by patient.

form.title: Request information
form.name: Full name
form.messageHint: Please do not include sensitive health information in this field.
form.consent: I have read the privacy notice and agree to be contacted about my request.
form.mailtoNote: Sending opens your email app; your request goes to batumi@genetikon.com.
form.responseNote: We usually respond within 1–2 business days.
form.errorRequired: Please fill in your name, contact and consent.

cookie.text: We use only strictly necessary cookies by default. Analytics cookies load only with your consent.
